# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build, Download, and Deploy Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'

      - name: Install dependencies and build project
        run: |
          npm install
          npm run build

      - name: Create artifact directory
        run: mkdir -p dist/artifacts

      - name: Create a dummy deployment script
        run: echo "echo 'Deploying application version 1.0.0'" > dist/artifacts/deploy.sh && chmod +x dist/artifacts/deploy.sh

      - name: Archive build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: dist
          retention-days: 1

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: staging # Assuming you have a 'staging' environment configured in GitHub
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: List downloaded artifacts
        run: ls -R ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: Execute deployment script for Staging
        run: ./downloaded-artifacts/artifacts/deploy.sh
        working-directory: ./downloaded-artifacts

  deploy-production:
    needs: deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production # Assuming you have a 'production' environment configured in GitHub
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: my-app-build
          path: ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: List downloaded artifacts
        run: ls -R ./downloaded-artifacts

      - name: Execute deployment script for Production
        run: ./downloaded-artifacts/artifacts/deploy.sh
        working-directory: ./downloaded-artifacts
